# Celestial Echoes of Eternity
## Scripture
"You have made the moon to mark the seasons; the sun knows its time for setting." - Psalm 104:19

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial rhythms that govern our lives. The phases of the moon, the sunrise and sunset, all echo the eternal nature of our God. Just as the moon waxes and wanes, our lives have seasons of growth and decay, yet God remains constant. The sun's faithful rising and setting demonstrate His sovereignty over time itself. In the grand tapestry of creation, we're invited to find our place within the larger narrative of God's eternal plan.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial ballet above, we're humbled by the reminder of Your eternal nature. Help us to find our rhythm in the seasons of life, to trust in Your sovereignty over all creation. May the moon's phases and the sun's faithful rising and setting remind us of Your constant presence, guiding us through life's ebbs and flows. As we navigate the twists and turns of our journey, may we echo the celestial harmony, reflecting Your glory and eternity to a world in need of Your light.
